entities.name: LITTLE MILLET
entities.description: A native, under-utilized multipurpose crop of India with potential for food, fodder, and bioenergy

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The native region of little millet

entities.name: SOIL AND ENVIRONMENTAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Varied conditions to which little millet is well adapted

entities.name: SHORT DURATION
entities.description: A characteristic of little millet that makes it a potential bioenergy crop

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per plant, showing significant variance among genotypes

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass produced by the plant

entities.name: LIMITED WATER SUPPLY
entities.description: A stress condition under which little millet can still produce good grain yield and biomass

entities.name: MARGINAL LANDS
entities.description: Low-quality lands in Indian conditions where little millet is grown

entities.name: ALPHA-DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to evaluate 200 accessions of little millet

entities.name: RESIDUAL MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD (REML) ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical analysis used to determine variance due to genotypes for important traits

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The time from sowing to flowering, ranging from 38 to 97 days

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth of the plant, ranging from 94 to 198 cm

entities.name: BASAL TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers originating from the base of the plant, ranging from 7.8 to 13.32

entities.name: DRY MATTER YIELD
entities.description: The weight of plant material after water removal, ranging from 23 to 159 g plant-1

entities.name: RACE ROBUSTA
entities.description: A race of little millet characterized by late flowering, taller height, and higher dry matter and grain yields

entities.name: RACE NANA
entities.description: A race of little millet used as a comparison for growth and yield traits

entities.name: BIOENERGY CROP
entities.description: A crop used for the production of energy, a potential use for little millet

entities.name: FOOD
entities.description: Human consumption use of little millet

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Animal feed use of little millet

entities.name: SEQUENCE VARIATIONS
entities.description: Genetic differences being researched for links to grain and biomass yields

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General characteristics of the crop related to production and growth
